summary: Pre-Phase 6 Cleanup verification PASSED. All 10 test cases passed: 1) Portfolio tab correctly removed from Settings modal, 2) Settings modal has Currency/Brand/Reviews tabs in correct order, 3) Brand tab opens brand settings with email signature, 4) Reviews tab opens testimonials management, 5) data-tour='settings-reviews' on Reviews tab, 6) Help panel has 4 new quick-start items, 7) Help panel has 3 new FAQs, 8) data-tour='crm-alerts' on Dashboard, 9) data-tour='revenue-dashboard' on Dashboard, 10) No critical console errors.

minor.issue: Single 500 error in console (non-critical, resource load)

passed_tests: 1. Settings modal has NO 'Portfolio' tab - correctly removed
2. Settings modal tabs are: Currency, Brand, Reviews (in correct order)
3. Brand tab (data-testid='brand-tab') opens with email signature generator content
4. Reviews tab (data-testid='testimonials-tab') opens with testimonials management

6. Help panel quick-start items: 'Track Your Income', 'Get Testimonials', 'Email Signature', 'Share Files with Clients'
7. Help panel FAQs: 'How does income tracking work?', 'How do I get client testimonials?', 'How do I share files with clients?'
8. Dashboard has data-tour='crm-alerts' wrapper around CRMAlerts component
9. Dashboard has data-tour='revenue-dashboard' wrapper around RevenueDashboard component
10. No critical console errors on Dashboard, Settings, Help panel
